text: Hi, I'm Jen from LifeWithLevi.com and today we are pumping while raking the leaves.
I am wearing a long sleeve t-shirt because, well, it's fall and it's starting to get a little chilly.
Plus, I don't need my wonderful neighbors to see what I'm doing out here.
At least, they don't need to see everything.
So, I've already got my pump on in my bag.
I've got my pumpies in place.
And the important thing you want to do is make sure that you get the shoulder strap
without getting your bottles in place.
You probably want to undo that one.
Get your shoulder strap up and over your neck so that as you're raking it doesn't fall out of place.
So, you just pop this back in.
And I've got my battery pack inside here.
I'm just going to turn things on here.
Flip of the switch.
And now, I can rake the leaves pretty well while pumping.
Once you get a big pile, make sure you call the kids out so they can jump in it.
And just continue on.
As you can see, I've got my pump.
I've got my pump going.
I've got everything pretty covered up.
My neighbors can't see anything.
And I can get some yard work done.
